two_turns_remaining: Red must put a unit on D2 (village) or row 1 by end of Turn 5 to win. Currently at D4/E4 with str 2/2 each. Bridge D3 is contested and Recon Co overwatch is intact. The kill criterion (per WARGAME-EXTENSION.md) is 'I'm spending more time cleaning up the AI's orders than I would have spent planning my own' — track if applies.
